ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., Country, Msa) */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region it belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the state capital */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the state information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state it belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the county seat */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the county information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county it belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude,longitude) of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the city information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecasted_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_yoy_pct_change" REAL /* Year-over-year percentage change forecasted */,
  "economic_indicator" TEXT /* Type of economic indicator (e.g., employment rate, consumer spending) */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the forecast data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
